title: LG Pinterest Contest Reminder
excerpt: Just wanted to remind you all of the awesome Limitless Design Pinterest Contest that LG is hosting! It's easy to enter to win - Just pin elements inspire and embody the theme of your choice (i.e., rustic country, beach house,…
body:
Just wanted to remind you all of the awesome Limitless Design Pinterest Contest that LG is hosting! It's easy to enter to win - Just pin elements inspire and embody the theme of your choice (i.e., rustic country, beach house, American classic, retro chic, etc.) onto your own kitchen design Pinterest boards inspired by Black Stainless Steel. Two grand prize winners will be selected and receive a complete kitchen suite of LG Black Stainless Steel Series appliances, $25,000 and a design consultation with Emily Henderson or David Bromstad to completely make over their kitchens. Be sure to visit HGTV.com/LGContest to enter! Good luck everyone, happy pinning! I've even updated my Pinterest board here!

Follow Amy Tangerine's board Limitless Designs Brought to You by LG on Pinterest.
